skills.name: portfolio-summary
skills.description: LLM-friendly summary of Mathieu Haye's portfolio: bio, projects, experience, contact details.

skills.name: portfolio-markdown
skills.description: Full portfolio content in Markdown for LLM consumption. Same content also available via HTTP content negotiation: GET / with Accept: text/markdown.

skills.name: journal-feed
skills.description: RSS feed of the bilingual journal (Business x AI x Data, published every two days).

skills.name: journal-index-markdown
skills.description: Machine-readable index of all journal articles (FR + EN), with title, date, language, slug and direct URL.

skills.name: sitemap
skills.description: XML sitemap listing all key sections of the portfolio and journal articles.

skills.name: api-catalog
skills.description: RFC 9727 linkset describing the discoverable resources of the site (service-desc, service-doc, service-meta).

skills.name: mcp-server-card
skills.description: WebMCP server card listing tools exposed by the site to AI agents (contact_info, list_projects, etc.).

skills.name: oauth-protected-resource
skills.description: OAuth 2.0 Protected Resource Metadata (RFC 9728). Declares this resource as public with no protected APIs.

skills.name: auth-md
skills.description: Agent authentication & registration guide (auth.md). Declares the site public and read-only: no authentication, no registration, no credentials. Self-contained discover->use recipe for agents.

skills.name: oauth-authorization-server
skills.description: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Server Metadata (RFC 8414) carrying the agent_auth block. Declares anonymous-only access; no interactive OAuth flow or token endpoint exists.

skills.name: robots-and-content-signals
skills.description: robots.txt with per-agent rules; Content Signals (search=yes, ai-input=yes, ai-train=no) are sent as an HTTP response header on every page.

skills.name: view-projects
skills.description: Open the Projects section (7 AI / data / CRM projects with details and screenshots).

skills.name: view-background
skills.description: Open the About section (freelance builder profile, stats, skills; full background on /projets).

skills.name: contact
skills.description: Contact Mathieu Haye by email, LinkedIn or phone.

skills.name: download-juice-jacking-guard-zip
skills.description: Recommended download: Juice Jacking Guard installer wrapped in a .zip archive (lower SmartScreen friction than raw .exe). Unsigned, Windows 10 / 11.

skills.name: download-juice-jacking-guard-exe
skills.description: Direct .exe download of the Juice Jacking Guard installer. Unsigned, Windows 10 / 11. May trigger browser SmartScreen — verify SHA-256.
